title: バンブーメモリー登場！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Looking at the morning sun always brings back
memories...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Memories of that day... and what Dad taught
me...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Bamboo! Someday, you'll have a dream
too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Your dream will be like the sun, giving you
strength and courage when you need it most!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
The reason my rival and I were able to face each
other time and time again was because we both
had a dream that connected us!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Your dream will help you grow and mature,
bringing you some of your most precious
encounters!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
But there's no rush! You don't need to figure it
out now! You'll find it one day, and it'll hit you
when you do!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm gonna find my own dream one day, just
like you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Okay, break time's up! Time to
get that blood pumping again with some more
red-hot early morning training!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Yessir!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I'm finally doing it, Dad! I'm headed toward my
dream!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ALL RIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Time to get pumped up! Let's start off the day
with some disciplinary committee work!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Burn bright, Bamboo Memory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I are finally ready to
challenge the Twinkle Series in earnest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to match Bamboo Memory's fighting spirit
and passion if I'm going to walk beside her! I pep
myself up and head to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: GOOOOOD MORNING!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory greets the other students with a
booming voice as they arrive at the academy! I
guess this is part of her duties as a disciplinary
committee member.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Bamboo Memory!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What a lovely greeting! Good morning to you
too! Have a great day!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm...
Hey, you! The one who just yawned! Your bow is
askew!

text_block_list.name: Sleepy Student
text_block_list.text: Oof, sorry! I-I'll fix it right away!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A lax outfit leads to a lax mentality! Straighten up
your collar! Get fired up! Have a great day!

text_block_list.name: Sleepy Student
text_block_list.text: S-sure...
choice_data_list: You've been working hard since morning, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Good morning!
choice_data_list: Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ooh, nice greeting, Trainer! I like it!
choice_data_list: What can I say? I'm feeling fired up.
What can I say? I'm feeling fired up.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah?! Me too! Just thinking about all the
exciting days in front of us until my debut has me
feeling electrified!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
However! I'm going to stay on top of my
disciplinary committee duties until training this
afternoon! This is also important to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since we're going to be walking this path
together, it's best if I learn as much as I can about
Bamboo Memory.
choice_data_list:
While I'm here, can I shadow your disciplinary
committee duties?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? I mean, of course... but why out of the blue?
choice_data_list: I want to know more about you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's kind of embarrassing, but I guess it
makes sense! Take a good look and see what
being on the disciplinary committee is all about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Bamboo Memory takes me through her
disciplinary committee duties.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You there! That's not where you recycle plastic
bottles! Make sure you dispose of your waste
properly!

text_block_list.name: Panicked Student
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I'll be more careful!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Stop! Look where you're going when you're
running! You need to be aware of your
surroundings at all times!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Student
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey! This is a public space! If you're going to film
something for UmaTok, please be careful!

text_block_list.name: Excited Student
text_block_list.text: Whoops! I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo's at it again today. I've been on the
other end of that once and her voice seemed so
loud. I was terrified.

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but she's really nice and takes her job seriously. She'll always rush right over if you need her... even if she is a little loud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While accompanying Bamboo Memory on her
rounds, I overhear some chatter about how she
can be quite strict, but also very reliable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain it's an impression built on her
straightforward and ever-enthusiastic personality.
choice_data_list:
(As her trainer, I should follow her example
too.)

(As her trainer, I should follow her example
too.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Bamboo Memory so devoted to her
disciplinary committee duties makes me want to
meet her candor with sincerity and enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, it's time for our afternoon training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oooooh boy! It's finally time to start training!
Let's do it, Trainer!
choice_data_list: We're going all out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
On that note... I know it's a bit early still, but is it
okay if I go ahead and run for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've already warmed up, so I'll be okay! My body
just won't stop tingling! Just one lap and I should
be okay! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems quite motivated, and I don't want to
discourage her by making her wait too long. So...
choice_data_list: Just one!
Just one!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'll be back in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory takes off with explosive
acceleration. As expected, she's definitely got
something special!

text_block_list.name: Student in Tracksuit A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Isn't that the head of the disciplinary
committee sprinting over there? Look at her go!

text_block_list.name: Student in Tracksuit B
text_block_list.text:
Her voice is pretty impressive too! Seeing that
kind of passion makes me feel like I've gotta go
for it too!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Such tremendous leg strength... And she runs with
such vitality as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I won't be outdone.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm not finished yet! GRAAAAAH!
choice_data_list: What happened to just one lap?!
What happened to just one lap?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an unexpected turn of events, Bamboo
Memory's training kicks off with a dead sprint
under clear skies.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And that's our first day DONE! Thanks, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Good job today!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Training just flew by! I can't believe it's already
evening. Talk about a packed regimen...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
choice_data_list: Bamboo?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt in my mind! One day, I'm gonna
have the ultimate showdown with the ultimate
rivals!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sorry for startling you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Anytime I see a beautiful sunset or a nice sunrise,
I just wanna shout out my dreams!
choice_data_list: ...It's a nice dream.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Mark my words! I'm going to pour in my heart,
soul, and whatever else is necessary to make this
dream come true! Let's make it happen!
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's do it!
Yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I've got an idea! Why don't you try shouting
your dreams at the sunset too?!
choice_data_list: Good thinking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gaze into the sunset, take a deep breath, and
give voice to my feelings and my current dream...
choice_data_list:
I'm going to make Bamboo Memory the
strongest Umamusume ever!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
With Trainer by my side, I'm gonna become the
strongest Umamusume! IT'S A PROMISE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My time spent taking on fiery challenges with
Bamboo Memory starts now!
